media_specific_repeated_phrases.provenance: ZDF Heute broadcast misquote of Musk 'Only by protesting REPEATEDLY and LOUDLY will there be any change!!' (Belfast context, Tommy Robinson related) as racist mob hunt call by 'British far-right extremist and tech billionaire Elon Musk'. Elon: 'Legal action is being taken against ZDF for their outrageous lies'. Widespread German support vs GEZ fees funding propaganda.
media_specific_repeated_phrases.correction: ZDF added note admitting imprecise/misleading; no full retraction or accountability yet. Echoed in replies: support for suit, calls to dismantle ZDF/ARD, 'buy ZDF', AfD praise, links to coordinated disinfo and AI-generated harassment narratives.
